projectName: GenAI IDP Accelerator - Threat Model v2.0
description: Comprehensive threat model for the GenAI Intelligent Document Processing Accelerator on AWS. Covers unified architecture with Pipeline and BDA processing modes, multi-agent AI system, MCP integration, RBAC, SDK/CLI, and all extensibility points.

assumptions.content: The system is deployed as single-tenant (one CloudFormation stack per environment)
AWS managed services (Bedrock, Textract, BDA) maintain their stated security postures and SLAs
Cognito User Pool is the sole authentication provider; no external identity federation
Customer-managed Lambda hooks and MCP agents are the customer's responsibility for secure implementation
All documents processed are customer-owned and may contain sensitive/PII data
Amazon Bedrock models do not use customer data for training (per AWS data processing policies)
Deployment follows AWS best practices for CloudFormation/SAM

threats.title: Prompt injection via document content
threats.description: Adversarial content embedded in documents could manipulate Bedrock model behavior during classification, extraction, or assessment

threats.title: OCR manipulation / adversarial documents
threats.description: Specially crafted documents designed to produce incorrect OCR output from Textract

threats.title: Model output manipulation / hallucination
threats.description: Bedrock model responses could contain hallucinated data or leak training information

threats.title: Cross-step data poisoning
threats.description: Compromised output from one pipeline step could poison subsequent steps

threats.title: Textract service dependency
threats.description: Textract throttling or outage stops Pipeline mode processing

threats.title: Configuration tampering
threats.description: Malicious modification of pipeline configuration could alter processing for all documents

threats.title: Few-shot example poisoning
threats.description: Malicious few-shot examples could systematically bias processing

threats.title: BDA service opacity
threats.description: Limited visibility into BDA internal processing reduces auditability

threats.title: BDA output format mapping errors
threats.description: Normalization of BDA output could introduce data corruption

threats.title: BDA project configuration tampering
threats.description: Modification of BDA project could alter processing behavior

threats.title: BDA service availability
threats.description: BDA throttling or outage stops BDA mode processing

threats.title: S3 cross-access via BDA
threats.description: Misconfigured S3 policies could allow BDA to access unintended objects

threats.title: SQL injection via natural language
threats.description: Natural language to SQL translation could produce malicious queries

threats.title: Arbitrary code execution via AgentCore
threats.description: AI-generated Python code executed in AgentCore could contain malicious operations

threats.title: Agent routing manipulation
threats.description: Prompt injection could manipulate orchestrator routing to invoke unintended agents

threats.title: Conversation history poisoning
threats.description: Earlier conversation turns could inject persistent context affecting later turns

threats.title: Cross-user data leakage via Athena
threats.description: Users could access other users' processed document data via Athena queries

threats.title: Prompt injection via chat messages
threats.description: Chat messages could manipulate model behavior or trigger unintended tool calls

threats.title: Conversation session hijacking
threats.description: Accessing another user's conversation history via predictable session IDs

threats.title: Real-time subscription eavesdropping
threats.description: Subscribing to another user's AppSync response stream

threats.title: Conversation history data exposure
threats.description: Sensitive chat content persisted in DynamoDB could be exposed

threats.title: Streaming response denial of service
threats.description: Complex agent operations consuming excessive resources

threats.title: Data exfiltration via MCP tools
threats.description: MCP tools could send sensitive document data to external services

threats.title: Malicious tool injection
threats.description: Injecting unauthorized tool definitions into agent configuration

threats.title: MCP response injection
threats.description: External services injecting malicious content into agent context via tool responses

threats.title: Unauthorized external service access
threats.description: MCP Lambdas accessing external services beyond intended scope

threats.title: External MCP client abuse
threats.description: External clients submitting excessive or unauthorized requests

threats.title: AgentCore gateway lifecycle attacks
threats.description: Disrupting AgentCore Gateway management

threats.title: Knowledge Base poisoning
threats.description: Malicious reference documents contaminating the knowledge base

threats.title: RAG context injection
threats.description: Prompt injection via retrieved KB content injected into LLM prompts

threats.title: OpenSearch Serverless data exposure
threats.description: Vector embeddings and document chunks exposed via misconfigured access

threats.title: Excessive RAG retrieval
threats.description: Crafted queries retrieving excessive KB content

threats.title: Privilege escalation via Cognito group manipulation
threats.description: Self-promoting to Admin role by modifying Cognito group membership

threats.title: JWT token theft / replay
threats.description: Stolen JWT tokens used for unauthorized access

threats.title: Insufficient authorization granularity
threats.description: AppSync resolver gaps allowing lower-privilege users to perform restricted operations

threats.title: Cognito user pool misconfiguration
threats.description: Weak Cognito settings allowing unauthorized account creation

threats.title: Refresh token abuse
threats.description: Stolen refresh tokens providing persistent unauthorized access

threats.title: Cross-tenant data access (multi-stack)
threats.description: Users accessing data across multiple deployment stacks

threats.title: Credential exposure on developer machines
threats.description: SDK/CLI credentials exposed via config files, shell history, or environment

threats.title: Insecure automation pipelines
threats.description: SDK credentials hardcoded in CI/CD pipelines

threats.title: SDK supply chain attack
threats.description: Compromised SDK dependencies

threats.title: Batch processing abuse
threats.description: SDK batch operations overwhelming processing pipeline

threats.title: Malicious customer code execution
threats.description: Malicious Lambda hook code abusing pipeline position

threats.title: Data exfiltration via post-processing hook
threats.description: Post-processing hook sending full results to unauthorized destinations

threats.title: Inference hook result tampering
threats.description: Compromised inference hook returning manipulated extraction results

threats.title: Hook Lambda timeout / failure cascade
threats.description: Customer hooks blocking the processing pipeline

threats.title: Privilege escalation via hook IAM role
threats.description: Over-permissioned hook Lambda accessing platform resources

threats.title: Cross-site scripting (XSS)
threats.description: Document processing results containing malicious HTML/JavaScript

threats.title: Presigned URL abuse
threats.description: Shared or intercepted presigned URLs used for unauthorized uploads

threats.title: GraphQL API abuse
threats.description: Deep queries, introspection, or batch operations exploiting AppSync

threats.title: CloudFront distribution misconfiguration
threats.description: Misconfigured CloudFront exposing S3 contents or cached data

threats.title: Client-side configuration exposure
threats.description: Backend endpoints visible in JavaScript bundles

threats.title: Reporting data tampering
threats.description: Modification or deletion of Parquet reporting files

threats.title: Athena query data exposure
threats.description: Athena queries exposing all processed document data

threats.title: Glue catalog manipulation
threats.description: Modified Glue table definitions altering Athena query behavior

threats.title: Evaluation data manipulation
threats.description: Tampered ground truth hiding accuracy degradation

threats.title: Discovery prompt injection via sample documents
threats.description: Adversarial samples manipulating AI-generated configurations

threats.title: Test Studio uncontrolled processing costs
threats.description: Excessive interactive testing consuming processing resources
